briefing.arm: Arm shares rose on the launch of the 'Arm AGI CPU' for data centers, projecting $15B in new annual chip sales within 5 years.
briefing.sk_hynix: SK Hynix has filed for a U.S. listing expected for H2 2026, aiming to raise $14B for capacity expansion despite some internal governance concerns.
briefing.cisco: Cisco introduced 'Cisco AI Defense' and 'DefenseClaw' to secure AI-driven workflows, marking its official entry into agentic AI security.
briefing.openai: OpenAI is discontinuing the Sora AI video generator to streamline its product focus, while its financing round reportedly reaches $120B valuation.
briefing.market_sentiment: Market focus has shifted toward concrete proof of AI returns, with scaling infrastructure spending remaining a top priority.
